response.global_summary: A video featuring a casual conversation between Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii, followed by a musical performance of the song 'Brave Shine' featuring Raora Panthera, Ouro Kronii, and Tokoyami Towa.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera and Ouro Kronii are having a conversation about their appearance and the color yellow, which then leads to a discussion about blue and purple. No singing occurs in this segment.
The VTubers transition the scene to a stage for an upcoming performance. No singing occurs in this segment.
A musical performance of 'Brave Shine' by Raora Panthera, Ouro Kronii, and Tokoyami Towa on a stage. The song includes an instrumental intro followed by the main vocal performance.
scenes.performer_in_video: Raora Panthera, Ouro Kronii, Tokoyami Towa
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
左手に隠した願いは願いのままで
覚めない夢見てた
右手には空の記憶 誰も知らない世界の果て
止まない雨に打たれていた
守りたいものを守れる強さ
それを信じられなくなる弱さ
全てを受け入れて
明日を探す
Brave shine 手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night 傷だらけの夜
You save my life かざした刃の先に
想いを重ねた
祈りは時を超えて
Your brave shine
光ること忘れた青い星が残してく
消えない影見てた
すれ違う赤の軌道 何も知らない子供のまま
明けない夜を彷徨ってた
失くせないものを失くした弱さ
何も信じられなくなる脆さ
立てなくなっても運命は進む
Break down 崩れ堕ちめてゆく星座が傷つけあう夜
You're breaking dawn 交わした約束の中に
独りを支えた確かな理想を添えて
守りたいものを守れるのなら
全てを受け入れて未来を探す
夜明けを灯す
Brave shine 手を伸ばせばまだ
Stay the night 傷だらけの夜
You save my life 重ねた涙の果てに光を見つけた
祈りは時を超えて
My brave shine
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I dreamed of visions I wouldn’t wake from
With the wish I’d hidden in my left hand still just that - a wish
In my right hand was my empty memory, as ceaseless rain
Pelted me at the end of a world nobody else knew about
The strength to protect the things I’d like to protect
The weakness that makes me stop believing in it
I go looking for tomorrow, accepting it all for what it is
Brave shine if I hold out my hand, I’ll still find
Stay the night a wounded night
You save my life I identified with the tip of the blade I held up
Prayer, cross through time
Your brave shine...
I watched the lasting shadows left behind
By the blue stars that had forgotten how to shine
I passed the red tracks, wandering through a never-ending night
Like a child who doesn’t know a thing
The weakness that made me lose things I can’t lose
The fragility that makes me stop believing in anything
Fate presses onward even when I can no longer stand
Break down the night that the crumbling constellations hurt each other
You’re breaking dawn I’ll take the undeniable hopes and dreams
From the promise we made that got me through being alone...
And, if I can protect the things that I’d like to protect,
Go looking for tomorrow, accepting it all for what it is
I turn on the lights of dawn
Brave shine if I hold out my hand, I’ll still find
Stay the night a wounded night
You save my life I found the light at the end of the tears I’ve piled up
Prayer, cross through time
My brave shine...
